case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO. BAKER-JOHNSON AGENCY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO. BAKER-JOHNSON AGENCY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
